title: Extended upsert with returning clause
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.upsert_and_return/1` that takes user attrs, upserts via `Repo.insert/2` with a changeset, uses `on_conflict: {:replace, [:name, :updated_at]}`, `conflict_target: :email`, and `returning: true`. The function should return the final (inserted-or-updated) User struct. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: `returning:` is often forgotten but critical when you need the result of the upsert. Combined with targeted replace.
